top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs post 5-day inflow streak, longest since May
top_signals.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $227 million in inflows as BTC climbed above $65,000, extending their longest winning streak since early May.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Tanker Crew Abandons Ship After Reported Strike in Hormuz
top_signals.summary: A tanker in the Strait of Hormuz reported being struck by an unknown projectile, forcing its crew to abandon the vessel and board a lifeboat, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations agency (UKMTO) said on Tuesday.UKMTO said it had received…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
